response.step_by_step_log:
1. 00:00 - 01:32: IRyS performs her song 'BE MY FLAME'. Identified via song performance and song title 'BE MY FLAME'. Search query used: 'IRyS BE MY FLAME lyrics'. Full lyrics obtained.
2. 01:32 - 05:00: IRyS talks to the audience about merch, new album, and upcoming concert. No music performance occurs.
3. Constructing the final JSON with 2 distinct scenes based on the performance and talk segments.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the original song 'BE MY FLAME' by IRyS, followed by a post-performance segment with announcements in both English and Japanese regarding merchandise, a new album, and a 1st solo concert.

scenes.description: IRyS performs her song 'BE MY FLAME' on a stage with a digital 'Be My Flame' banner. The performance is dynamic with dance moves and vibrant stage effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
can't control it anymore , i 'm burnin ' up red
crazy thoughts fill in ' my head
( tension rising to the top ,
won't look back , i 'll never stop ,
blazing , boiling , gettin ' hot
it 's your fault , baby )
fever burning up inside ,
it can't be contained
got my heart goin' up in flames
tell me you can feel the searing heat
( come on and come on i wanna confess ,
baby oh baby i 'm gettin ' obsessed )
are you gonna run away , or burn up with me ？
( crank it up , crank it up , hotter and hotter ,
gonna be wanna be ready for more )
i 'm caught in a heat wave , i 'll never get enough ,
fanning the flame of love
( and now it 's taking over )
blazin ' fire , make me a believer ,
i 'm gettin ' dizzy from the smoke in the air .
wild desire , burnin ' like a fever ,
come hold me close if you dare ！
fire lover , be my flame
keep me burning
fire lover , call my name
sweet love burn me away
i 'm gonna wanna turn it up , i 'm burnin ' up , can't get enough
maybe i 'm too hot to touch ,
it 's your fault , baby
i can't hide it anymore , i 'm bearing my soul ,
let these flames swallow me whole
this is how we 're gonna play ;
a dangerous game ,
got your fire runnin ' through my veins
baby , can't you read between the lines ？

scenes.description: IRyS stands on stage and speaks directly to the audience, delivering a series of announcements in English and Japanese. The background graphic displays information about her merchandise and upcoming projects.
